description_long: This is a stylized adult figure suspended in mid-air, appearing to be performing an aerial acrobatic maneuver using long, ribbon-like fabric. The person has a slender build and is depicted with elongated limbs and a simplified, angular form. The figure's arms are extended upward, gripping the fabric, while the legs are bent at the knees, suggesting a dynamic pose typical of aerial silk performers. The head is slightly tilted, and the facial features are minimalistic. The clothing consists of a fitted top and pants, and the person is wearing pointed shoes, enhancing the sense of movement and grace.
description: A stylized adult performing an aerial silk pose, gripping long fabric with arms extended and legs bent, dressed in fitted attire and pointed shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, extended arms gripping the fabric, and bent legs in a dynamic pose.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated limbs, the grip on the fabric, and the profile of the bent legs and pointed shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the fabric attachment, and the curvature of the body and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the face, the extended arms, and the angular bend of the legs.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and slim pants, performance attire
attribute_posture: suspended in an aerial acrobatic pose with arms extended upward and legs bent
